.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(66, 184, 131) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgb(23, 23, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
